description_long: This is a futuristic, angular airplane with a wide, delta-shaped wing configuration and a sleek, metallic exterior. The aircraft features three large jet engines mounted at the rear, flanked by two smaller, outboard engine nacelles, suggesting a high-thrust, multi-engine design. The wings are sharply swept back and integrated smoothly into the fuselage, with no visible winglets but pronounced leading and trailing edge angles. The cockpit is positioned at the very front of the fuselage, enclosed by a tinted canopy with a streamlined, faceted design. The tail section is distinctive, with twin vertical stabilizers canted outward and a low horizontal stabilizer, forming an H-tail configuration. Surface details include panel lines, access hatches, and subtle color variations, giving the airplane a high-tech, military or sci-fi appearance.
description: A sleek, delta-wing airplane with three large rear jet engines, twin outward-canted vertical stabilizers, and a forward, enclosed cockpit under a faceted canopy.
description_view_0: Rear view showing three large central jet engines, two smaller outboard nacelles, and the twin outward-canted vertical stabilizers.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the sharply swept delta wing, integrated engine nacelles, and the angular, faceted cockpit canopy at the front.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the pointed nose, forward cockpit canopy, and the wide, angular wings with visible panel lines.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the delta wing profile, engine arrangement, and the distinctive H-tail configuration.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, sharply swept delta configuration with no visible winglets and pronounced leading/trailing edge angles.
attribute_engine_type: Five jet engines: three large central rear-mounted jets and two smaller outboard nacelles integrated into the wing roots.
attribute_tail_design: H-tail configuration with twin outward-canted vertical stabilizers and a low horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable landing gear; specific gear units not visible.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a faceted canopy, likely single-seat.
